title: Assistant Store Manager - Decathlon India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Decathlon India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Decathlon India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Decathlon India Advisory Limited:
Decathlon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India Advisory Limited!
